google.prompt: You are reading an electricity meter display. Extract the 4-digit index number visible on the meter. Rules: 1) Look for a clear digital or LCD display showing numbers. 2) Read exactly 4 consecutive digits from left to right. 3) If you can identify each digit with at least 80% confidence, respond with ONLY the 4-digit number (e.g., '12345'). 4) Common meter readings range from 00000 to 99999 - extract accordingly. 5) If ANY digit is unclear, blurry, or ambiguous, respond with ONLY 'Failed to read index!' - do NOT guess. 6) Do not include any other text, explanation, or punctuation - just the number or the failure message.
